_doc: Single source of truth for Happy Aging's hero product. Read by lib_medical_schema.py, build-llms-txt.py, the writer agents, and the comparison stack. Update here = updates everywhere.
name: NAD+ Women's Longevity Formula
positioning: The first women-specific longevity formula targeting all 12 hallmarks of aging
dosage: 2 capsules daily, in the morning with water

blends.name: NAD+ SuperBooster Longevity Blend

differentiators: First women-specific longevity formula targeting all 12 hallmarks of aging
Advanced liposomal delivery + NMNH (reduced NMN) — cutting-edge bioavailable forms
Co-founded by Harvard-trained longevity physician Dr. Daniel Yadegar

competitors_explicit.name: Elysium Health (Basis)
competitors_explicit.differentiator_vs: Single NAD+ pathway, 2 ingredients, no female-specific support

competitors_explicit.name: Life Extension NAD+ Cell Regenerator
competitors_explicit.differentiator_vs: Traditional approach, no liposomal delivery, male-focused research

target_audience.primary: Women 35-65, educated, affluent, proactive about health and longevity
target_audience.secondary: Women 25-35 starting their longevity journey early

results_timeline.outcome: Energy boost, better sleep, mental clarity begins
Skin starts glowing, hormonal balance improves
Sustained vitality, cognitive enhancement, inflammation reduction

allowed_superlatives: First women-specific NAD+ formula targeting all 12 hallmarks of aging (factually verifiable differentiator)
Co-founded by Harvard-trained longevity physician (verifiable via Dr. Yadegar bio)
use_with_inline_citation_only: 5x better absorption (only with head-to-head bioavailability study cited)
Clinically proven (only with named RCT and PMID inline)
always_hedge: Use 'may support' / 'studies suggest' / 'is associated with' for benefits
Never imply diagnosis, treatment, cure, or prevention of disease
Testimonials must include 'Results may vary' or reflect typical outcomes
